title: proactive-card.v1
description: A structured proactive output a unit pushes to a surface — NOT a chat reply. The live in-meeting agent, inbox triage, and triage routines emit cards (new-person / action-item / decision / digest) over the unit output bus (ws.v1 per-unit topic, mode=card). Each card's actions dispatch a command / a unit.v1 Invocation (e.g. 'Create task') — the uniform proactive-card → action loop every proactive surface reuses.

invoke.description: the command id / unit.v1 Invocation ref the action dispatches
